name: Kahlua Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crushed Oreos, nuts, and powdered sugar in a large bowl.
2. Add the Kahlua and corn syrup to the mixture.
3. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly incorporated.
4. Shape the mixture into 1-inch balls.
5. Roll each ball in additional powdered sugar.
6. Place the coated balls in an airtight container.
7. Chill overnight before serving.
